report.summary: Audited 2 new learn pages (RaaS Guide 2026, Staking-as-a-Service Providers 2026) for UX and accessibility, created missing OG image for staking providers page, and fixed accessibility issues including aria-labels and table scope attributes.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added aria-label='Table of contents' to staking providers page nav element (RaaS page already had it)
Added scope='col' to all table header cells in staking providers page (2 tables, 10 headers total)
Added aria-label attributes to both data tables in staking providers page for screen reader context
Verified both pages use responsive table patterns (overflowX: auto) for mobile compatibility
Verified both pages use clamp() for fluid heading typography (28px-48px)
Verified both pages have proper breadcrumb navigation and ToC with anchor links
Both pages confirmed using correct dark theme color palette and glass-morphism info boxes

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-staking-service-providers-2026.svg (1200x630) — Dark theme with provider cards showing Lido, Kiln, Figment, P2P.org, Coinbase with market share bars, fee indicators, and market stats. Uses brand gradient accent bar and glass-morphism card styling.

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/raas-rollup-as-a-service-guide-2026 — No issues found; OG image already existed, tables have proper aria-labels and scope attributes, ToC has aria-label
/learn/staking-as-a-service-providers-guide-2026 — Fixed 3 accessibility issues (nav aria-label, table aria-labels, th scope attributes); created missing OG image
